title: Admin Assignment Control Model

assignment_actions.label: Assign New Draft to Editor
assignment_actions.purpose: Admin sends a new article draft task to Editor.

assignment_actions.label: Assign Existing Article to Editor
assignment_actions.purpose: Admin sends an existing article candidate to Editor for correction or enrichment.

assignment_actions.label: Reassign Editor
assignment_actions.purpose: Admin changes the assigned editor in a future workflow.

assignment_actions.label: Withdraw Assignment
assignment_actions.purpose: Admin withdraws an assigned item before final review.

assignment_actions.label: Receive Editor Return
assignment_actions.purpose: Admin receives editor-completed work back into Admin review.

assignment_flow: Admin selects article candidate or new draft task.
Admin assigns item to Editor with note and expected correction/preparation scope.
Editor works only inside assigned workspace.
Editor sends work back to Admin.
Admin reviews evidence, delta and final status.
